Projects

Production data systems and applied ML — from NLP pipelines to trend intelligence.

D2C Fashion Trend Intelligence Pipeline

A production-grade data science pipeline that merges unstructured social signals (23K+ customer reviews, Google Trends) with structured sell-through data (31M+ H&M transactions) to generate actionable trend intelligence for fashion brands. Features three fine-tuned/applied transformer models: LoRA-tuned RoBERTa for sentiment, BART zero-shot for style tribe classification, and MiniLM + HDBSCAN for semantic trend clustering. Outputs a composite trend score with quadrant classification (HOT / EMERGING / FADING / COLD) and an interactive Plotly dashboard.

PyTorchTransformersLoRAHDBSCANUMAPPlotlypandasGoogle Trends
GitHub 
Score = 0.25 x sell_through_velocity
     + 0.25 x sentiment_lift         (fine-tuned RoBERTa)
     + 0.20 x trend_momentum         (Google Trends slope)
     + 0.15 x style_buzz             (BART zero-shot)
     + 0.15 x cluster_strength       (HDBSCAN density)

Healthcare Data Platform — CertifyOS

Built the analytics backbone for a healthcare credentialing platform handling millions of provider records. Designed credentialing volume forecasting models and KPI frameworks in BigQuery and Looker, reducing provider onboarding delays by ~30% and improving SLA compliance from 95% to 99%. Engineered automated ETL pipelines that eliminated 60% of manual reporting overhead across 5+ product lines, freeing ~40-60 analyst hours per week.

BigQueryPythonSQLLookerETLGCPPredictive Analytics

NLP Pipeline for Provider Record Matching

Built an NLP-based name matching system using spaCy and Hugging Face that improved NPI attribution accuracy by 10% across millions of healthcare provider records. The pipeline automated cleaning, deduplication, and extraction, cutting manual credentialing processing time by 70% and boosting overall data accuracy by 50%.

spaCyHugging FaceNLPPythonSQLHealthcare
